This website uses cookies to ensure you get the best experience.

Oda and our selected partners use cookies and similar technologies (together “cookies”) that are necessary to present this website, and to ensure you get the best experience of it. If you consent to it, we will also use cookies for analytics purposes.

See our Cookie Policy to read more about the cookies we set.

You can withdraw and manage your consent at any time, by clicking “Manage cookies” at the bottom of each website page.

Select which cookies you accept

On this site, we always set cookies that are strictly necessary, meaning they are necessary for the site to function properly.

If you consent to it, we will also set other types of cookies. You can provide or withdraw your consent to the different types of cookies using the toggles below. You can change or withdraw your consent at any time, by clicking the link “Manage Cookies”, which is always available at the bottom of the site.

To learn more about what the different types of cookies do, how your data is used when they are set etc, see our Cookie Policy.

These cookies are necessary to make the site work properly, and are always set when you visit the site.

These cookies collect information to help us understand how the site is being used.

Operations · Lier

Fulfillment Operator

At Oda, we develop affordable grocery services to make the logistics of living surprisingly easy. First, we built Norway’s leading online grocery store, and now, partnered with Mathem in Sweden, we’re on our way to becoming the world’s most effective retail system, delivering to thousands of Scandinavian doorsteps every week.

Join our team of Fulfillment Operators at Lier!

At Oda, you’ll work in a fast-paced, inclusive environment with passionate colleagues who value collaboration and learning. As a Fulfillment Operator, you’ll play a key role in picking and delivering high-quality groceries to the right customer. Together, we tackle operational challenges, support each other, and help shape Oda as a great place to work💪🏼

What you’ll be doing

  • Pick and pack goods for customers

  • Be the first point of contact for the handover of goods from suppliers

  • Ensure that products are on the shelves and that the workplace is kept tidy

  • Work closely with your team to achieve our operational goals and measure against company KPI´s

  • Contribute to a culture that works with continuous improvement of processes and working methods

What you’ll need to succeed🌟

  • Like to work as part of a team towards a common goal, and are keen to help others around you

  • See solutions rather than problems and offer suggestions for improvement where necessary

  • Are comfortable with and like routine-based tasks

  • Are motivated by working in an environment with a high pace and physical activity

  • Are self-driven and enjoy taking ownership of tasks

  • Have a genuine desire to work and grow in Oda

  • Speak and understand English. Norwegian is a plus

  • The minimum age requirement for this position is 18 years

What would be nice to have💡

  • Previous experience from warehouse work, in a value chain, trade, or production

  • It's a plus if you have a forklift certificate

  • Being service-minded and customer-focused

  • Having your own car or being able to drive is great, as our working hours don't align well with public transportation

What we offer🚀

This is your chance to make a real impact in a fast-moving company with a product people love—while shaking up the grocery industry. You’ll experience:

  • Teammates who aim high and have each other’s backs. We care about people, and that means supporting each other every step of the way

  • A flat structure where we team up across disciplines to solve exciting challenges. Big ideas come from everywhere

  • A transparent way of working. We use Slack to stay in the loop—less email, fewer meetings, more getting things done

  • Discounted lunch and a free gym to stay fueled and energized🏋

  • Oda Shuttle Bus: We offer a shuttle bus service for all employees between Lørenskog (Solheimveien) ➔ Helsfyr ➔ Sjølyst/Skøyen ➔ Lier 🚌

Practical informationℹ️

  • We're hiring for both day and night shifts. Please specify in your application what shift you're applying for. Shifts are fixed, not rotating. You will never be scheduled for a split shift or asked to switch between day and night shifts

  • Working hours:

    • Day shift 06:30-14:30

    • Night shift 22:00-06:00

    • You are going to follow a fixed schedule with a shift rotation, working every fourth weekend

  • We're hiring for all three of our departments: Dry, Cold and Terminal Freeze. You’ll primarily work in one department, but it’s essential to be flexible and assist in the others when needed. Please specify in your application which department you're applying for

  • Application deadline: We're actively looking for the right person to join our team, so we’ll be interviewing candidates on a rolling basis. Because we might close the ad early if we find the perfect fit, make sure to get your application in as soon as possible

  • Starting date: We're looking for our next great team member to join us this August, and we evaluate applicants as they come in

  • Location: Drammensveien 189, 3420 Lierskogen

A few final words

At Oda, you’ll join a passionate, ambitious team working to change the future of grocery shopping. We’re all different—just like you—and we wouldn’t have it any other way. If you need any adjustments or support during the application process, just let us know, and we’ll do our best to help. We believe in the strength of a diverse workforce and want everyone to have an equal shot at landing the job🧡

Come build the future of grocery with us! Want to know more about how we work? Check out these posts on Medium.

As part of our work to ensure a fair and open-minded recruitment process, we have chosen to collaborate with Hubert.ai, a virtual recruitment assistant that helps with the selection process. As soon as you submit an application for this position, you will be invited via email to a chat-based interview. Therefore, be careful to enter your correct email address so the invitation reaches the right place🤖

We look forward to hearing from you🧡
